name: Brewed Coffee for Air Pots
procedure: [Barista Prep]

name: Cappuccino
procedure:
[Hot Drinks]
1. Fill small frothing pitcher to the 9 oz line with whole milk (unless otherwise specified)
2. Before putting steam wand in the milk, turn it on to blow out any water or milk might be in the line
3. Put frothing thermometer in the pitcher
4. Put wand just under the surface of the milk and turn dial on all the way
5. As froth starts to rise slowly pull the pitcher downward always keeping the wand just under the surface of the foam, allowing it to foam to rise more.
6. Turn steamer off once the thermometer reaches 140⁰ for adult drinks
7. Brew 2 shots of espresso (6oz), while letting the foam and milk settle
8. Pour the espresso into a big mug, pour the milk and top with all the foam
9. Lightly dust the top with cinnamon
10. Turn the steamer on for a second to blow out any liquid in the wand
11. Wipe down wand with a clean damp towel
12. Empty grinds after each brew (to avoid the screen burning)

[Plating — Beverage Flash Cards]
• Espresso, steamed milk and foam
• Dusted with cinnamon
• Served in a BIG MUG
• On a tray

name: Latte
procedure:
[Hot Drinks]
1. Fill frothing pitcher to the 11 oz line with whole milk (unless otherwise specified)
2. Before putting steam wand in the milk, turn it on to blow out any water or milk might be in the line
3. Put frothing thermometer in pitcher
4. Place wand in the center or the bottom of the milk in the pitcher & turn steamer on all the way
5. Brew 2 shots of espresso (6oz)
6. Turn steamer off once the thermometer reaches 140⁰ for adult drinks
7. Pour 2 shots of espresso and all the steamed milk into a Big Mug
8. Turn the steamer on for a second to blow out any liquid in the wand
9. Wipe down wand with a clean damp towel
10. Empty grinds after each brew (to avoid to the screen burning)

[Plating — Beverage Flash Cards]
• Espresso, steamed milk
• Served in a BIG MUG
• On a tray

name: Tropical Bliss Smoothie
procedure:
[Blender Drinks]
1. 2oz Strawberry reduction
2. 2oz OJ shaken
3. 1 Grey scoop (4 oz) cubed pineapple
4. 1 Medium sized ripe banana
5. 1 Small blue ice scoop of ice

[Plating — Beverage Flash Cards]
• Ice, banana, strawberry reduction, pineapple and OJ blended
• Served in a tall glass
• On a tray

name: Tropical Bliss Smoothie – In a pint container
procedure:
[Barista Prep]
1. 2oz Strawberry reduction
2. 2oz Orange juice
3. 1 Grey scoop pineapple (4oz)
4. 1 Whole banana
5. Add to blender pitcher
6. Add a leveled blue scoop of ice and blend on 4
7. * Chocolate Milk, Marshmallow Cold Foam & Mocha Cold Brew shelf life is 3 days
8. * Tropical Bliss & Annie’s shelf life is 2 days
